voice: Warm-authoritative with deliberate edge: trusted mentor, not vendor; clinically credible without sounding sterile.

typography.heading: Editorial serif such as Cormorant Garamond or Playfair Display
typography.body: Readable humanist sans such as Inter or Source Sans 3
typography.utility: Condensed sans for labels and credentials

signature_phrases: Your body's ability to heal is greater than anyone has permitted you to believe.
